name: Anthony Albanese
title: Prime Minister of Australia

compatibilityOverrides.reason: AUKUS alliance and Five Eyes intelligence partnership
Trade disputes, diplomatic tensions over Pacific influence
Quad partnership and Indo-Pacific security alignment

biography: Anthony Albanese, Australia's 31st Prime Minister, rose from public housing in inner Sydney to lead the Australian Labor Party to government. His ISFJ temperament manifests as steady, detail-oriented governance focused on pragmatic coalition-building rather than grand ideological gestures. He navigates Australia's delicate position between its primary security ally (the United States via AUKUS) and its largest trading partner (China), while managing domestic priorities around climate policy, indigenous reconciliation, and cost-of-living pressures.
